Description: For participated/syndicated credit facilities, report percentage of total commitment held. If not participated/syndicated, report 1.
Allowable Values: Decimal to 4 places (e.g. 0.05%=0.0005). No scientific notation.

Description: Indicate 2 (Yes) if credit facility is leveraged loan per SR 13-3 criteria.
Report disposition method for credit facilities disposed during reporting quarter. Still pursuing payment = 0.
Allowable Values: 0=Active; 1=Payoff; 2=Involuntary payoff; 3=Involuntary Liquidation; 4=Sold or fully participated; 5=Below reporting threshold; 6=Transfer to another Y-14 schedule; 7=Expired Commitment to Commit

Description: For facilities with option 6 in Field 61, indicate Y-14 report/schedule/sub-schedule to which facility shifted.
Allowable Values: Format: Q.H.1 (for FR Y-14Q H.1); M.A.1 (for FR Y-14M A.1)

Description: Report allowance for credit losses per ASC 326-20. Credit facility level if available, otherwise pro-rated from collective (pool).
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar signs, commas, or decimals. 0 if no reserve.

Description: If PCD asset, report noncredit discount/premium per ASC 326-20-30-13. Credit facility level if available, otherwise pro-rated. Blank if not PCD.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar signs, commas, or decimals.

Description: Maturity date exclusive of extension options. Demand loans = 9999-01-01. Commitments to commit: estimated maturity per terms.
For HFS/FVO loans: total commitment per credit agreement. If not HFS/FVO: NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.

Description: For HFS/FVO loans: outstanding funded exposure. If not HFS/FVO: NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.
